headlines.title: U.S. Forces Intercept Iranian Attacks on Three Navy Ships and Strike Facilities
headlines.summary: U.S. military intercepted Iranian attacks on three Navy ships in Strait of Hormuz and struck Iranian targets Thursday amid declared truce. Affects global oil transit and prices. Trump insists ceasefire holds but threatens escalation without peace deal. Risks broader Middle East conflict.

framings.angle: U.S. strikes Iranian targets after Iran fired on warships Trump threatens more action
U.S. intercepts attacks on 3 Navy ships transiting Hormuz targets Iranian facilities
U.S. and Iran trade fire fanning fears over shaky ceasefire Trump affirms truce
Iran accuses U.S. ceasefire breach CENTCOM cites response to attacks day 70
Conflicting claims on who fired first Trump insists ceasefire remains in place
Oil prices rise after U.S. Iran exchange fire in Hormuz Trump truce comment

headlines.title: North Korea Deploys New Long-Range Artillery Systems Targeting Seoul
headlines.summary: North Korea announces deployment of new artillery capable of striking Seoul this year plus first destroyer soon. Threatens 25 million in South Korean capital region. Heightens Korean peninsula tensions amid stalled talks.

headlines.title: Al-Qaeda-Linked Militants Kill More Than 30 in Central Mali Attacks
headlines.summary: JNIM militants conducted two attacks Thursday killing over 30 in central Mali per local sources. Civilians and security forces affected amid post-junta violence surge. Undermines stability in Sahel region.

headlines.title: Mount Dukono Erupts Killing Three Hikers Leaves 10 Missing in Indonesia
headlines.summary: Mount Dukono on Halmahera island erupted Friday killing three hikers two foreigners one local 10 missing from 20 group. Rescue teams respond. Underscores volcano hiking dangers in seismically active Indonesia.

headlines.title: Brazil’s Lula and Trump Hold Three-Hour White House Talks Easing Tariff Strains
headlines.summary: Presidents Lula and Trump met three hours Thursday at White House stabilizing Brazil-U.S. ties strained by tariffs. Impacts bilateral trade worth billions. Positive signals ahead of Brazil election reduce diplomatic rift.

framings.angle: Lula hails three-hour White House talks with Trump stabilising tariff-strained relations
Lula Trump seek reset easing rift Trump avoids backing Brazil right-wing candidate

headlines.title: Tesla China Gigafactory Delivers 74,478 Vehicles in April Up 36 Percent
headlines.summary: Tesla Shanghai delivered 74,478 units in April up 36% year-on-year from subsidies EV demand energy shock includes exports. China market rivals intensify. Signals Tesla resilience in key growth region.

headlines.title: Toyota Forecasts ¥3 Trillion Operating Income Amid Iran Tensions Shares Fall
headlines.summary: Toyota cuts fiscal year ending March 2027 operating income forecast to ¥3 trillion citing Iran disruptions shares drop 2.2%. Affects global auto supply chains investors. Highlights geopolitical risks to industry.
